# VERSION

****

The version of CloudKit JS.

## Declaration

```swift
const String VERSION;
```

## Constants

- **BUILD_VERSION**: The CloudKit JS build number.
- **CLOUDKIT_LOADED**: An event that is fired when CloudKit JS is loaded. Used when `CloudKit.js` is loaded asynchronously.
